security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri:; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api-v2.degenbox.app https://api.degenbox.app https://api.hyperliquid.xyz https://quote-api.jup.ag

bundle.shortDescription: DegenBox local signer — self-custody Solana + Hyperliquid trading.
bundle.longDescription: Native desktop signer for DegenBox. Holds an encrypted local copy of your Hyperliquid agent key + Solana hot-wallet, signs orders queued by the DegenBox cloud, and reports back. Keys never leave your device.

updater.__note: UPDATER DISABLED for the unsigned first releases — re-enable with a real keypair before public release. Steps: (1) `pnpm tauri signer generate -w ~/.tauri/degenbox-signer.key`, (2) paste the printed PUBLIC key into `pubkey` below, (3) restore `endpoints` to ["https://github.com/DEGENBOX/degenbox-v2/releases/latest/download/latest.json"], (4) set `bundle.createUpdaterArtifacts` to true, (5) add TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY(_PASSWORD) secrets and re-enable the env lines in .github/workflows/release-signer-app.yml. The config object itself must stay present: tauri-plugin-updater is registered in lib.rs and app startup fails if `plugins.updater` is missing. Empty `endpoints` makes the Settings 'Check for updates' button return a caught, harmless error instead of verifying against a bogus key.
